# 🛡️ Real-Time Fraud Detection System with Explainable AI

**Week 4 Capstone | Advanced | AI & Data Analytics**

---

## Project Structure

```
fraud_detection/
├── fraud_detection_capstone.ipynb   ← Main notebook (Tasks 1–8)
├── app.py                           ← Streamlit home page
├── pages/
│   ├── 1_📊_Overview.py            ← KPIs, charts, model comparison
│   ├── 2_🔍_Transaction_Explorer.py ← Search & filter table
│   └── 3_🧠_SHAP_Explainer.py      ← Per-transaction SHAP waterfall
├── requirements.txt
└── README.md
```

**Generated by running the notebook:**
```
lgbm_model.pkl       ← Tuned LightGBM model
xgb_model.pkl        ← XGBoost model
scaler.pkl           ← RobustScaler
shap_explainer.pkl   ← SHAP TreeExplainer
feature_names.pkl    ← List of feature names
test_results.csv     ← Predictions + risk tiers on test set
```

---

## Setup Instructions

### 1. Install dependencies
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

### 2. Download dataset from Kaggle
- Go to: https://www.kaggle.com/c/ieee-fraud-detection/data
- Download: `train_transaction.csv` and `train_identity.csv`
- Place both files in the same directory as the notebook

### 3. Run the Jupyter notebook
```bash
jupyter notebook fraud_detection_capstone.ipynb
```
Run all cells top to bottom. This will:
- Train all models
- Compute SHAP values
- Save all `.pkl` artifacts and `test_results.csv`

### 4. Launch the Streamlit dashboard
```bash
streamlit run app.py
```
Open http://localhost:8501 in your browser.

---

## Deploy to Streamlit Community Cloud

1. Push this project folder to a **public GitHub repository**
2. Go to https://share.streamlit.io
3. Click **New app** → select your repo → set `app.py` as the main file
4. Click **Deploy** — takes ~3 minutes
5. Copy the live URL → paste into your README below

**Live Dashboard URL:**
> `https://your-app-name.streamlit.app` ← replace with your actual URL after deployment

---
